text: Oh, my teacher loves video games, and my friend and I were talking about the origins of Weegee and she thought we were talking about Luigi, so we clarified. Then we showed her a picture of Weegee and she said, "Aw! He's cute!" My friend shouted, "NO!" Then I told her what Weegee is capable of, and she said "Well, I guess I would'nt look so great with a mustache..."
